title: Client Reviews | It's A Keeper Photography
description: 96 five-star Google reviews from Tri-Cities families, seniors and business owners. Read what it's really like to be photographed by Lisa.

hero.heading: What Tri-Cities Families Say
hero.intro: I could tell you what a session with me feels like — but the people who've stood in front of my camera say it better.

sections.heading: 96 Five-Star Reviews — and Every One Is a Story
paragraphs: The compliment I treasure most, and the one that appears again and again in my reviews, is this: how comfortable and at ease people felt — even the ones who normally hate being photographed. That's not an accident. It's the entire way I've built my sessions for twenty years.

items.quote: If you noticed a theme — "I was so nervous, and then…" — that's the part I want you to hear. Almost everyone arrives a little unsure. Almost everyone leaves saying it was actually fun. You will too.

pending: [PENDIENTE CRÍTICO: Q47 — selección de 8–12 reseñas reales de Google con permiso/nombres. La estructura queda lista; las citas de ejemplo son placeholders de las 3 del sitio actual.]
[PENDIENTE: reseñas de seniors — priorizar las que mencionen confianza/comodidad y el reveal]
